user.title: Connect BeWave hub
user.description: Configure the IP address or hostname of the BeWave hub.

device_menu.title: Add zones
device_menu.description: Configured zones: {zone_count}. Each zone creates a stateless trigger button and, when feedback fields are filled in, a separate status entity.

add_device.title: Add zone
add_device.description: Create one BeWave zone. The trigger command becomes a button entity. The feedback messages create a separate read-only status entity.

error.invalid_host: Enter a valid host or IP address.
error.at_least_one_device: Add at least one zone before finishing setup.
error.invalid_device: Check the zone fields. Name and command are required, and feedback must contain both ON and OFF messages if used.

abort.already_configured: This BeWave hub is already configured.

init.title: Manage zones
init.description: Configured zones: {zone_count}. Add, edit, or remove zones.

add_device.title: Add zone
add_device.description: Create one BeWave zone. The trigger command becomes a button entity. The feedback messages create a separate read-only status entity.

edit_device.title: Edit zone
edit_device.description: Edit the zone details. The trigger command is sent when the button is pressed. Feedback messages update the separate status entity.

error.invalid_device: Check the zone fields. Name and command are required, and feedback must contain both ON and OFF messages if used.
